scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,connector,raw-events,outbox,frontend -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:connector" "npm run worker:raw-events" "npm run worker:message-outbox" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/frontend && npm run build --workspace apps/whatsapp-connector
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/frontend && npm run lint --workspace apps/whatsapp-connector
